SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_SEALED_BOOK_REL: Clow and Sakura cards grant Magic Charge when played: 1 normally, 2 for Powers. At 10 charge, the next eligible card spends 10 charge for its Extra effect.
The Clow Cards wait in the sealed pages.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_SEALED_WAND_REL:
When a non-secondary enemy dies, gain {ChargeGain} charge. Gain {EliteBossExtraGain} additional charge in Elite and Boss rooms, and {SealExtraGain} additional charge if Seal dealt the killing damage.
At the start of the first turn after your charge reaches {TriggerThreshold}, spend {TriggerThreshold} charge and add 1 Turn to your hand.
Each Sakura card or Turn in your deck increases the charge required for your next Turn by {TriggerIncrease}.
Next convert needs {RemainingCharge} more charge.
A key-shaped wand that gathers the light needed to turn Clow into Sakura.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_STAR_WAND_RELIC:
Replaces Sealed Wand. When a non-secondary enemy dies, gain {ChargeGain} charge. Gain {EliteBossExtraGain} additional charge in Elite and Boss rooms, and {SealExtraGain} additional charge if Seal dealt the killing damage.
At the start of the first turn after your charge reaches {TriggerThreshold}, spend {TriggerThreshold} charge and add 1 Turn to your hand and deck.
Each Sakura card or Turn in your deck increases the charge required for your next Turn by {TriggerIncrease}.
Next convert needs {RemainingCharge} more charge.
Star power answers the new incantation, and the wand changes with it.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_ULTIMATE_WAND_R:
When a non-secondary enemy dies, gain {ChargeGain} charge. Gain {EliteBossExtraGain} additional charge in Elite and Boss rooms, and {SealExtraGain} additional charge if Seal dealt the killing damage.
At the start of combat, if you have Sealed Book, gain {BattleStartMagicCharge} Magic Charge. For every {ElementTrigger} elemental Clow or Sakura cards you play, if you have Sealed Book, gain {ElementMagicCharge} Magic Charge.
At the start of your turn, upgrade {HandUpgrades} random card(s) in your hand and mark a random enemy. Marked enemies take {MarkDamageIncrease}% more attack damage until their turn starts.
At the start of the first turn after your charge reaches {TriggerThreshold}, spend {TriggerThreshold} charge and add 1 Turn to your hand. Each Sakura card or Turn in your deck increases the charge required for your next Turn by {TriggerIncrease}.
Next convert needs {RemainingCharge} more charge.
The powers of sun, moon, and stars meet in one wand.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_SWORD_JADE_RELI: Release increases a card's non-damage, non-block numbers by 100% instead of 50%.
A jade pendant that carries the Li family's sword spirit.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_TEDDY_BEAR_RELI: Whenever you play a Spell other than Empty Spell, gain 3 Block.
A handmade bear stitched with a wish to protect.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_ROLLER_SKATES_R: At the start of your turn, if you have less than 3 Dexterity, gain 1 Dexterity.
They make every awkward dash look almost planned.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_TOUYAS_BICYCLE_: Whenever you exhaust a Void, if you have Sealed Book, gain 1 Magic Charge.
Touya's bike keeps arriving exactly when Sakura needs to move.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_TAOIST_SUIT_REL: Every fourth Clow or Sakura card you play adds an Empty Spell to your hand.
Syaoran's battle clothes are cut for sharp steps and sharper spells.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_YUKITOS_BENTO_B: If you ended your last turn with 0 Energy, gain 1 Energy at the start of this turn.
Yukito packed enough for everyone, somehow.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_COMPASS_RELIC.d: At the start of combat, choose 1 of 3 random Clow cards to add to your hand and deck. It costs 0 this turn. Add 3 Void to your discard pile.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_COMPASS_RELIC.f: The needle points toward a card before Sakura knows its name.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_TOMOYOS_HEART_R: Every fourth card you exhaust, draw 1 card.
Tomoyo's camera sees courage before Sakura can.
At the start of combat, if you have Sealed Book, gain 6 Magic Charge. At the start of your turn, mark a random enemy. Marked enemies take 25% more attack damage until their turn starts.
The guardian of the seal is small only when he wants snacks.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_YUE_RELIC.title: Yue
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_YUE_RELIC.descr: For every third elemental Clow or Sakura card you play each turn, if you have Sealed Book, gain 1 Magic Charge. At the start of your turn, upgrade 1 random card in your hand.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_YUE_RELIC.flavo: Moonlight answers only to judgment earned.
SAKURA_MOD_RELIC_CLASSIC_MOON_BELL_RELIC: Whenever you play a card with base cost 2 or more, heal 1 HP. The first time you would die, heal 30% of your Max HP instead and add Turn to your hand and deck. Then this relic becomes used.
A bell from the moon shrine that rings only at the edge of loss.
